origin.capability_match: Add Incentive Tokens to Reward Vault

attack_surface.data_description: Call to incentive management functions within the Reward Vault contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The Reward Vault contract may have a flaw in its authorization logic, allowing unauthorized users to perform Token Manager actions.

actor_risk.description: The privileges of the Token Manager role are the target for elevation by an unauthorized entity.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Unauthorized control over a Reward Vault's incentives can lead to fund misappropriation or severe disruption of its PoL participation.

assumptions: The Reward Vault contract's access control for functions like adding incentives or setting rates is flawed or bypassable.
An attacker discovers and successfully exploits this vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Implement and rigorously audit robust access control mechanisms (e.g., role-based access specific to the designated Token Manager) in the Reward Vault smart contract. Follow the principle of least privilege.

description: An unauthorized entity successfully calls functions on a Reward Vault (Component ID 209) that are intended only for the designated Token Manager (Actor ID 7), thereby illegitimately managing Incentive Tokens or rates.

trace_source.matched_capability: Add Incentive Tokens to Reward Vault
